schema_id.description: Unique identifier for this schema document

gate_id.description: Unique identifier for the promotion gate

suite_id.description: The evaluation suite this gate applies to

run_id.description: Identifier of the evaluation run this gate summarises

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the gate decision was made

score_summary.description: Summary of scores that informed the gate decision

threshold_summary.description: Summary of thresholds and whether they were met

regression_summary.description: Summary of regressions detected against the baseline

baseline_change_ref.description: Reference to a baseline change record if the baseline was adjusted

promotion_blockers.description: List of identifiers or descriptions of blockers preventing promotion

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues detected during gate evaluation

errors.description: Fatal issues detected during gate evaluation
